name: claude-ally-health
description: A health assistant skill for medical information analysis, symptom tracking, and wellness guidance.
readme:
# WellAlly Health вҖ” Privacy-First Personal Health Intelligence System

[![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue.svg)](README.md)
[![дёӯж–Ү](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-дёӯж–Ү-red.svg)](README.zh-CN.md)

[![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/huifer/WellAlly-health?style=social)](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health)
[![GitHub forks](https://img.shields.io/github/forks/huifer/WellAlly-health?style=social)](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/huifer/WellAlly-health)](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health/commits/main)
[![PRs Welcome](https://img.shields.io/badge/PRs-welcome-brightgreen.svg)](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
[![Made with Claude Code](https://img.shields.io/badge/made%20with-Claude%20Code-ff6f00.svg)](https://claude.com/claude-code)
[![Star History Chart](https://api.star-history.com/svg?repos=huifer/WellAlly-health&type=date&legend=top-left)](https://www.star-history.com/#huifer/WellAlly-health&type=date&legend=top-left)

**WellAlly Health** is a local-first, AI-powered **personal health record (PHR)** system. It turns your medical reports, prescriptions, imaging, and daily health tracking into a private, searchable, structured knowledge base that runs entirely on your own machine вҖ” no cloud, no database server, no account required.

> **GitHub**: https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health

> **вҡ пёҸ Disclaimer**: This project is **NOT** affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/) or [Claude.ai](https://claude.ai/). It is an independent open-source project developed by [WellAlly Tech](https://www.wellally.tech/). WellAlly Health is built on top of Claude Code's command-line tooling and uses AI image recognition (e.g. GLM `mcp__4_5v_mcp__analyze_image`) for document understanding.
>
> **This is not a medical device.** All analysis is for personal reference only and must never replace professional medical advice.

## Table of Contents

- [Why WellAlly Health](#why-wellally-health)
- [вңЁ Features](#-features)
- [рҹҡҖ Quick Start](#-quick-start)
- [рҹ“Ӯ Directory Structure](#-directory-structure)
- [рҹ§© Command Reference (60+)](#-command-reference-60)
- [рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ•пёҸ Specialist Domains](#-specialist-domains)
- [рҹӣ пёҸ Analysis Skills](#пёҸ-analysis-skills)
- [рҹ”§ Technical Architecture](#-technical-architecture)
- [рҹ’Ҡ Drug Interaction Database](#-drug-interaction-database)
- [рҹ”’ Data Privacy](#-data-privacy)
- [рҹ—әпёҸ Roadmap](#пёҸ-roadmap)
- [рҹӨқ Contributing](#-contributing)
- [рҹӣЎпёҸ Security](#пёҸ-security)
- [вҡ пёҸ Important Safety Statement](#-important-safety-statement)
- [рҹ“„ License](#-license)

## Why WellAlly Health

Your health data is scattered across hospital portals, paper printouts, photos, and memory. Commercial apps ask you to upload it to *their* cloud. WellAlly Health takes the opposite approach:

- **рҹ”’ Truly private** вҖ” everything lives in plain files on your disk. Nothing leaves your machine.
- **рҹ“„ Zero effort ingestion** вҖ” drop in a photo of a lab report or discharge summary; AI extracts the structured data for you.
- **рҹ§  AI that knows your history** вҖ” drug-interaction checks, multi-specialty analysis, and trend tracking all understand *your* records.
- **рҹ—ӮпёҸ One searchable source of truth** вҖ” biochemical values, imaging, surgeries, radiation exposure, medications, and allergies in one place.
- **вҷ»пёҸ Yours forever** вҖ” open JSON + Markdown format, no lock-in, easy to back up or export.

WellAlly Health is the **personal health record (PHR)** / **personal health information system (PHIS)** for people who want AI assistance *without* surrendering their medical privacy.

## вңЁ Features

**Local-first & private**
- рҹ“Ғ Pure file-based storage (JSON + Markdown), **no database required**
- рҹ’ҫ 100% on-device вҖ” no uploads, no telemetry, no external accounts
- рҹ”“ Open format you fully own and can back up anywhere

**Intelligent medical document understanding**
- рҹ–јпёҸ Medical report image recognition (OCR + AI structuring)
- рҹ“Ҡ Automatic biochemical test value & reference-range extraction
- рҹ”Қ Structured medical imaging data extraction
- рҹ“Ӣ Structured discharge summary storage

**Clinical safety intelligence**
- рҹ’Ҡ **Drug interaction detection** вҖ” drugвҖ“drug, drugвҖ“disease, drugвҖ“dose, drugвҖ“food
- рҹҡЁ **Five-level severity warning system** (A / B / C / D / X, where X = absolute contraindication)
- вҳўпёҸ Medical radiation dose tracking (BSA-adjusted + decay model)
- рҹ”Ә Surgery history & implant management
- рҹ‘Ө User profile, allergy, and medication management

**Multi-disciplinary expertise**
- рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ•пёҸ **Multi-Disciplinary Team (MDT) consultation** across 16 specialty domains
- рҹ”¬ 13+ single-specialist deep-dive analyses
- рҹ§© 20 specialized analysis skills (sleep, nutrition, fitness, mental health, TCM constitution, and more)

**Whole-lifecycle coverage**
- рҹ§’ Child health (development, illness, nutrition, sleep, vaccination, safety)
- рҹӨ° Women's & men's health (cycle, pregnancy, postpartum, menopause, fertility, prostate)
- рҹ©ә Chronic disease management (diabetes, hypertension, COPD, cognitive health)
- рҹ§ҳ Lifestyle & wellness (diet, goal, travel, occupational, rehabilitation)
- рҹҢҝ Traditional Chinese Medicine constitution analysis

## рҹҡҖ Quick Start

> Prerequisite: [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) installed and opened in this project directory.

```bash
# 1. First-time setup вҖ” set height(cm) weight(kg) birthdate
/profile set 175 70 1990-01-01

# 2. Save your first lab report from an image
/save-report /path/to/image.jpg

# 3. Record a radiation scan
/radiation add CT chest

# 4. Record a past surgery in plain language
/surgery Gallbladder removal surgery in August last year due to gallstones

# 5. Save a discharge summary from a photo
/discharge @еҢ»з–—жҠҘе‘Ҡ/еҮәйҷўе°Ҹз»“.jpg

# 6. Query everything
/query all

# 7. Start a multi-disciplinary consultation
/consult
```

That's it вҖ” no programming, no server, no sign-up.

## рҹ“Ӯ Directory Structure

```
my-his/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ commands/            # 60+ slash commands (see Command Reference)
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ save-report.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ query.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ profile.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ radiation.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ surgery.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ discharge.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ medication.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ interaction.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ consult.md
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ specialist.md
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ specialists/         # 16 specialty + MDT coordinator Skills
в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ profile.json          # User basic profile
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ radiation-records.json
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ allergies.json
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ interactions/         # Drug interaction database + logs
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ interaction-db.json
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ interaction-logs/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ medications/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ з”ҹеҢ–жЈҖжҹҘ/             # Biochemical test data (YYYY-MM/...)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ еҪұеғҸжЈҖжҹҘ/             # Medical imaging data + image backups
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ жүӢжңҜи®°еҪ•/             # Surgery history
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ еҮәйҷўе°Ҹз»“/             # Discharge summaries
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ index.json            # Global index
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
```

## рҹ§© Command Reference (60+)

WellAlly Health ships **62 slash commands**. Highlights by domain:

**Core data management**
`/profile` В· `/get-profile` В· `/query` В· `/save-report` В· `/report` В· `/report-instructions` В· `/prepare` В· `/ai` В· `/consult` В· `/specialist` В· `/allergy` В· `/medication` В· `/interaction` В· `/surgery` В· `/discharge` В· `/radiation` В· `/radiation-data` В· `/symptom` В· `/screening` В· `/polypharmacy`

**Specialty analysis**
`/sleep` В· `/nutrition` В· `/diet` В· `/fitness` В· `/mental-health` В· `/mood` В· `/psych-assess` В· `/cognitive` В· `/tcm-constitution` В· `/skin-health` В· `/oral-health` В· `/eye-health` В· `/ent` В· `/sexual-health` В· `/occupational-health` В· `/rehabilitation` В· `/infection` В· `/rheumatology`

**Child & family**
`/family` В· `/child-development` В· `/child-illness` В· `/child-mental` В· `/child-nutrition` В· `/child-safety` В· `/child-sleep` В· `/child-vaccine`

**Women's & men's health**
`/cycle` В· `/pregnancy` В· `/postpartum` В· `/menopause` В· `/puberty` В· `/male-menopause` В· `/male-fertility` В· `/prostate-health`

**Chronic disease & aging**
`/hypertension` В· `/diabetes` В· `/copd` В· `/growth` В· `/vaccine` В· `/vaccination` В· `/travel-health` В· `/fall` В· `/goal`

> рҹ’Ў Full command specs and examples: [User Guide (EN)](docs/user-guide.en.md) В· [з”ЁжҲ·жҢҮеҚ—пјҲдёӯж–Үпјү](docs/user-guide.md)

## рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ•пёҸ Specialist Domains

16 clinical specialty domains, coordinated by an MDT consultation orchestrator:

| # | Specialty | # | Specialty |
|---|-----------|---|-----------|
| 1 | Cardiology (еҝғеҶ…з§‘) | 9 | Neurology (зҘһз»ҸеҶ…з§‘) |
| 2 | Dermatology (зҡ®иӮӨз§‘) | 10 | Oncology (иӮҝзҳӨз§‘) |
| 3 | Endocrinology (еҶ…еҲҶжіҢз§‘) | 11 | Orthopedics (йӘЁз§‘) |
| 4 | Gastroenterology (ж¶ҲеҢ–з§‘) | 12 | Pediatrics (е„ҝз§‘) |
| 5 | General Practice (е…Ёз§‘) | 13 | Psychiatry (зІҫзҘһз§‘) |
| 6 | Geriatrics (иҖҒе№ҙз§‘) | 14 | Respiratory (е‘јеҗёз§‘) |
| 7 | Gynecology (еҰҮз§‘) | 15 | Urology (жіҢе°ҝз§‘) |
| 8 | Hematology (иЎҖж¶Із§‘) | 16 | Nephrology (иӮҫеҶ…з§‘) |

Use `/consult` for a full MDT review or `/specialist <domain>` for a focused deep dive.

## рҹӣ пёҸ Analysis Skills

20 reusable analysis skills power the commands above:

`ai-analyzer` В· `emergency-card` В· `family-health-analyzer` В· `fitness-analyzer` В· `food-database-query` В· `goal-analyzer` В· `health-trend-analyzer` В· `infection-specialist` В· `mental-health-analyzer` В· `nutrition-analyzer` В· `occupational-health-analyzer` В· `oral-health-analyzer` В· `rehabilitation-analyzer` В· `sexual-health-analyzer` В· `skin-health-analyzer` В· `sleep-analyzer` В· `tcm-constitution-analyzer` В· `travel-health-analyzer` В· `weightloss-analyzer` В· `wellally-tech`

## рҹ”§ Technical Architecture

- **Storage** вҖ” JSON files + filesystem directory layout (no database, fully portable)
- **Command system** вҖ” Claude Code slash commands (natural-language friendly)
- **Expert system** вҖ” multi-specialty Skill definitions + Subagent architecture
- **Consultation coordination** вҖ” parallel processing + opinion-integration algorithm
- **Document understanding** вҖ” AI visual analysis + intelligent text recognition/structuring
- **Radiation modeling** вҖ” body-surface-area adjustment + exponential decay model

> рҹ”§ Deep dive: [Technical Implementation Details (дёӯж–Ү)](docs/technical-details.md) В· [Data Structure Spec](docs/data-structures.en.md)

## рҹ’Ҡ Drug Interaction Database

Built-in **drug interaction detection** covering drugвҖ“drug, drugвҖ“disease, drugвҖ“dose, and drugвҖ“food interactions, graded by a **five-level severity system (A/B/C/D/X)**.

- рҹ”Қ Auto-detect interactions in your current medication combination
- рҹҡЁ Severity-graded warnings (A = negligible вҶ’ X = absolute contraindication)
- рҹ“Ӣ Detailed management recommendations & monitoring indicators
- рҹ’ҫ Custom rules and check history

```bash
/interaction check      # check current medications
/interaction list       # list all rules
/interaction list X     # show absolute-contraindication rules
```

> рҹ“– [Drug Interaction Database Guide (дёӯж–Ү)](docs/drug-interaction-database.md) вҖ” medical professionals welcome to contribute.

## рҹ”’ Data Privacy

- вң… All data stored on your local filesystem
- вң… No uploads to any cloud service
- вң… No external database or network dependency
- вң… Fully private, portable, and exportable

WellAlly Health is designed for people who treat their medical history as strictly personal.

## рҹ—әпёҸ Roadmap

- Expanded specialty coverage and deeper longitudinal trend analytics
- Richer data visualization and export formats
- Community-contributed interaction rules and knowledge base
- Local LLM option for fully offline operation

See [`docs/plans`](docs/plans) for design notes.

## рҹӨқ Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Whether it's a new command, a specialist Skill, interaction rules, translations, or docs вҖ” we'd love your help.

- рҹ“– [Contributing Guide](.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- рҹҗӣ [Report a bug](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
- рҹ’Ў [Request a feature](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)
- рҹҸ·пёҸ Look for [**good first issue**](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22) to get started
- рҹ’¬ Join the conversation in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/huifer/WellAlly-health/discussions)

## рҹӣЎпёҸ Security

Found a vulnerability? Please follow our [Security Policy](.github/SECURITY.md) and report privately вҖ” do **not** open a public issue.

## вҡ пёҸ Important Safety Statement

This system strictly follows medical safety principles:

1. **Does not provide specific medication dosages**
2. **Does not directly prescribe prescription drugs**
3. **Does not predict life prognosis**
4. **Does not replace a doctor's diagnosis**

All analysis from this system is for reference only and is **not** a basis for medical diagnosis. All medical decisions require consultation with a qualified professional. In an emergency, seek immediate medical attention.

## рҹ“„ License

Released under the [MIT License](LICENSE).

**Important Disclaimer**: WellAlly Health is for personal health management only and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis or treatment.

---

Developed and maintained by [WellAlly Tech](https://www.wellally.tech/).

WellAlly Health is a local-first, AI-powered personal health record (PHR) system. It turns your medical reports, prescriptions, imaging, and daily health tracking into a private, searchable, structured knowledge base that runs entirely on your own machine вҖ” no cloud, no database server, no account required.

> вҡ пёҸ Disclaimer: This project is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Anthropic or Claude.ai. It is an independent open-source project developed by WellAlly Tech. WellAlly Health is built on top of Claude Code's command-line tooling and uses AI image recognition (e.g. GLM mcp__4_5v_mcp__analyze_image) for document understanding.

>

> This is not a medical device. All analysis is for personal reference only and must never replace professional medical advice.

Why WellAlly Health

Your health data is scattered across hospital portals, paper printouts, photos, and memory. Commercial apps ask you to upload it to *their* cloud. WellAlly Health takes the opposite approach:

  • рҹ”’ Truly private вҖ” everything lives in plain files on your disk. Nothing leaves your machine.
  • рҹ“„ Zero effort ingestion вҖ” drop in a photo of a lab report or discharge summary; AI extracts the structured data for you.
  • рҹ§  AI that knows your history вҖ” drug-interaction checks, multi-specialty analysis, and trend tracking all understand *your* records.
  • рҹ—ӮпёҸ One searchable source of truth вҖ” biochemical values, imaging, surgeries, radiation exposure, medications, and allergies in one place.
  • вҷ»пёҸ Yours forever вҖ” open JSON + Markdown format, no lock-in, easy to back up or export.

WellAlly Health is the personal health record (PHR) / personal health information system (PHIS) for people who want AI assistance *without* surrendering their medical privacy.

вңЁ Features

Local-first & private

  • рҹ“Ғ Pure file-based storage (JSON + Markdown), no database required
  • рҹ’ҫ 100% on-device вҖ” no uploads, no telemetry, no external accounts
  • рҹ”“ Open format you fully own and can back up anywhere

Intelligent medical document understanding

  • рҹ”Қ Structured medical imaging data extraction

Clinical safety intelligence

  • рҹ’Ҡ Drug interaction detection вҖ” drugвҖ“drug, drugвҖ“disease, drugвҖ“dose, drugвҖ“food
  • рҹҡЁ Five-level severity warning system (A / B / C / D / X, where X = absolute contraindication)
  • вҳўпёҸ Medical radiation dose tracking (BSA-adjusted + decay model)
  • рҹ”Ә Surgery history & implant management
  • рҹ‘Ө User profile, allergy, and medication management

Multi-disciplinary expertise

  • рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ•пёҸ Multi-Disciplinary Team (MDT) consultation across 16 specialty domains
  • рҹ”¬ 13+ single-specialist deep-dive analyses
  • рҹ§© 20 specialized analysis skills (sleep, nutrition, fitness, mental health, TCM constitution, and more)

Whole-lifecycle coverage

  • рҹ§’ Child health (development, illness, nutrition, sleep, vaccination, safety)
  • рҹӨ° Women's & men's health (cycle, pregnancy, postpartum, menopause, fertility, prostate)
  • рҹ©ә Chronic disease management (diabetes, hypertension, COPD, cognitive health)
  • рҹ§ҳ Lifestyle & wellness (diet, goal, travel, occupational, rehabilitation)
  • рҹҢҝ Traditional Chinese Medicine constitution analysis

рҹҡҖ Quick Start

> Prerequisite: Claude Code installed and opened in this project directory.


# 1. First-time setup вҖ” set height(cm) weight(kg) birthdate

# 2. Save your first lab report from an image

/save-report /path/to/image.jpg



# 3. Record a radiation scan

/radiation add CT chest



# 4. Record a past surgery in plain language

# 5. Save a discharge summary from a photo

/discharge @еҢ»з–—жҠҘе‘Ҡ/еҮәйҷўе°Ҹз»“.jpg

рҹ”§ Technical Architecture

  • Storage вҖ” JSON files + filesystem directory layout (no database, fully portable)
  • Command system вҖ” Claude Code slash commands (natural-language friendly)
  • Expert system вҖ” multi-specialty Skill definitions + Subagent architecture
  • Consultation coordination вҖ” parallel processing + opinion-integration algorithm
  • Document understanding вҖ” AI visual analysis + intelligent text recognition/structuring
  • Radiation modeling вҖ” body-surface-area adjustment + exponential decay model

> рҹ”§ Deep dive: [Technical Implementation Details (дёӯж–Ү)](docs/technical-details.md) В· [Data Structure Spec](docs/data-structures.en.md)

рҹ’Ҡ Drug Interaction Database

Built-in drug interaction detection covering drugвҖ“drug, drugвҖ“disease, drugвҖ“dose, and drugвҖ“food interactions, graded by a five-level severity system (A/B/C/D/X).

  • рҹ”Қ Auto-detect interactions in your current medication combination
  • рҹҡЁ Severity-graded warnings (A = negligible вҶ’ X = absolute contraindication)
  • рҹ“Ӣ Detailed management recommendations & monitoring indicators
  • рҹ’ҫ Custom rules and check history

/interaction check      # check current medications

/interaction list       # list all rules

/interaction list X     # show absolute-contraindication rules

> рҹ“– [Drug Interaction Database Guide (дёӯж–Ү)](docs/drug-interaction-database.md) вҖ” medical professionals welcome to contribute.

рҹ”’ Data Privacy

  • вң… All data stored on your local filesystem

WellAlly Health is designed for people who treat their medical history as strictly personal.

вҡ пёҸ Important Safety Statement

This system strictly follows medical safety principles:

1. Does not provide specific medication dosages

2. Does not directly prescribe prescription drugs

3. Does not predict life prognosis

4. Does not replace a doctor's diagnosis

All analysis from this system is for reference only and is not a basis for medical diagnosis. All medical decisions require consultation with a qualified professional. In an emergency, seek immediate medical attention.
